title: steiropteris leprieurii var. costalis
intro: Steiropteris leprieurii var. costalis, also known as the Costal Steiropteris fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Steiropteris leprieurii var. costalis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas or infusions, and it may also be used in the form of tinctures or capsules.
